allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
REMNANT Phase 1: Complete isometric survival game

Fully playable isometric survival game with PZ-inspired gameplay:
- Procedural 128x128 world generation \(seeded noise, biomes, rivers\)
- Isometric tile rendering with viewport culling and sprite pooling
- 8-directional player movement with sprint, sneak, collision
- Survival system \(hunger, thirst, fatigue, temperature, health\)
- Day/night cycle with weather transitions
- Resource gathering \(chop trees, mine rocks, forage bushes\)
- Full inventory system with equipment slots
- Crafting system with 49 recipes and station requirements
- Building system with ghost preview placement
- HUD stat bars, hotbar, interaction prompts
- Death screen with cause and survival stats
- Save/load with server and localStorage fallback
- Enhanced procedural textures \(multi-layer noise, tile variants\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
